query:
SELECT o.slug, o.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM taskCompletion tc WHERE tc.organizationId = o.id) as tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validationResults vr WHERE vr.organizationId = o.id) as validations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes n WHERE n.organizationId = o.id) as files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeResponses ir WHERE ir.organizationId = o.id) as intakeAnswers
FROM organizations o ORDER BY o.slug;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.slug, o.name, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM taskCompletion tc WHERE tc.organizationId = o.id) as tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validationResults vr WHERE vr.organizationId = o.id) as validations,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes n WHERE n.organizationId = o.id) as files,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeResponses ir WHERE ir.organizationId = o.id) as intakeAnswers
FROM organizations o ORDER BY o.slug;
